workflow.name: Moderate Telegram content and post approved items to Facebook and LinkedIn
workflow.description:
## How it works

1. Triggers when a Telegram callback query is received.
2. Evaluates the message with a conditional statement.
3. Directs the flow based on language or action choice.
4. Fetches data from Google Sheets once confirmed.
5. Posts the confirmed content to Facebook and LinkedIn.

## Setup steps

- Configure Telegram credentials in the Telegram Trigger and other Telegram nodes.
- Set up Google Sheets API access for the 'Get row(s) in sheet' node.
- Set up Facebook Graph API access.
- Configure LinkedIn API access for the 'Create a post' node.

## Customization

Adjust the language-specific nodes to handle any additional languages needed.

## Part of the AI Content Master system

This workflow works together with the Generator workflow:
- 👉 AI Content Master — Multilingual Content Generator with GPT-4o and Telegram: https://n8n.io/workflows/15360

parameters.content:
## AI Content Master - Moderator

### How it works

1. Triggers when a Telegram message is received.
2. Evaluates the message with a conditional statement.
3. Directs the flow based on language or action choice.
4. Fetches data from Google Sheets once confirmed.
5. Posts the confirmed content to Facebook and LinkedIn.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Configure Telegram credentials in the Telegram Trigger and other Telegram nodes.
- [ ] Set up Google Sheets API access for the 'Get row(s) in sheet' node.
- [ ] Set up Facebook Graph API access.
- [ ] Configure LinkedIn API access for the 'Create a post' node.

### Customization

Adjust the language-specific nodes to handle any additional languages needed.

## Telegram input trigger

Triggers the workflow when a message is received in Telegram.

## Conditional branching

Evaluates the received message and branches flow based on conditions.

## Language confirmation

Routes message to confirmation nodes based on language evaluation.

## Send a text response

Sends a text response if conditions are not met.

## Data retrieval

Fetches data from Google Sheets based on confirmation.

## Social media posting

Posts confirmed content to Facebook and LinkedIn.

parameters.text: Great choice, Zhenya! Your post is scheduled to be published on Facebook and LinkedIn. You’re the true conductor of this AI symphony!
Świetny wybór! Twój post jest w kolejce do publikacji na Facebook i LinkedIn. Jesteś prawdziwym dyrygentem tej symfonii AI!
¡Brillante elección! Tu post está en cola para publicación en Facebook y LinkedIn. ¡Eres el verdadero director de esta sinfonía de IA!
Got it! Draft deleted. Archaeological precision above all — keep searching!
Rozumiem! Szkic usunięty. Precyzja archeologiczna przede wszystkim — szukamy dalej!
¡Entendido! Borrador eliminado. ¡La precisión arqueológica ante todo — seguimos buscando!
Sorry, this bot only works for its owner.

user.name: Yevhenii
user.bio: AI automation specialist building practical n8n workflows for business. Background in archaeology and professional translation — I bring structured, detail-oriented thinking to every automation project. Currently building a modular Restaurant AI Suite and publishing ready-to-use workflow templates.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
